notableEvents.label: Alec Burleson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Alec Burleson grounds into a double play, second baseman Brandon Lowe to shortstop Konnor Griffin to first baseman Spencer Horwitz. JJ Wetherholt out at 2nd. Alec Burleson out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jordan Walker plunked
notableEvents.detail: Jordan Walker hit by pitch. Alec Burleson to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: José Fermín pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: José Fermín pops out to catcher Endy Rodríguez in foul territory.
